notes: Chunk contains a single event: Q&A portion (part 2 of 2) of the CAKE 2024-05-08 earnings call transcript; no fiscal_kpis in this chunk.
All evidence quotes are verbatim substrings of the event content; all candidates share source_id CAKE_2024-05-08T17.00.
new_restaurant_development named to avoid banned state words 'opening'/'growth'; the evidence is the cadence of brand-new restaurant openings diluting total margin.
consumer_trade_down: 'trade-down' kept as the standard consumer-behavior noun phrase, not a stock-direction word; flagged for reviewer judgment.
Skipped as vague/metaphor (4): 'flight to quality' (metaphor), passing 'advertising' mention (no causal claim), guest value/quality perception (too vague), 'choppy sales environment' (bare category).
